name: Voucher Report
query:
SELECT
    pl.date AS "Date:Date:120",
    CONCAT(pli.employee, ': ', emp.employee_name) AS "Employee:Data:250",
    pli.ec_lot AS "EC Lot:Link/EC Lot:150",
    pli.item AS "Item:Link/Item:180",
    pli.operation AS "Operation:Link/Operation:150",
    pli.qty AS "Qty:Float:100",
    pli.rate AS "Rate:Currency:120",
    pli.amount AS "Amount:Currency:120"
FROM `tabEC Process Lot Item` pli
INNER JOIN `tabEC Process Lot` pl
    ON pl.name = pli.parent
LEFT JOIN `tabEmployee` emp
    ON emp.name = pli.employee
WHERE
    (%(from_date)s IS NULL OR pl.date >= %(from_date)s)
    AND (%(to_date)s IS NULL OR pl.date <= %(to_date)s)
ORDER BY
    pl.date DESC,
    emp.employee_name
